title: UKAEA equipment purchased via UKRI grant funding
body: "The UKAEA equipment below was purchased using a grant from UK Reasearch and Innovation. It is listed on the Jisc Equipment Data Service .     Name Description Date commissioned     Plasma Focused Ion Beam Instrument (PFIB) https://www.ukaea.org/service/plasma-focussed-ion-beam-scanning-electron-microscope/ 10/11/2022   Focused Ion Beam Instrument (GaFIB) https://www.ukaea.org/service/ion-beam-scanning-electron-microscope/ 28/06/2013   Analytical Scanning/ Transmission Electron Microscope (TEM) https://www.ukaea.org/service/jeol-neoarm-scanning-transmission-electron-microscope/ 26/11/2024   Xray Diffractometer (XRD) https://www.ukaea.org/service/x-ray-diffractometer/ 16/08/2019   High vacuum differential scanning calomrimetry system (Precision) (HV-DSC) https://www.ukaea.org/service/differential-scanning-calorimeter/ Not operational     "
